title: Top IPs from Nginx Access Log
description:
Parse an Nginx access log (Combined Log Format). The first space-separated field on each line is the client IP.

Return the top 5 IPs by request count, one per line as `ip count`, sorted by count descending (ties broken alphabetically by IP).

Return an empty string for empty input.
constraints: Input is a plain string passed to solve(input string) string
Return a string matching the expected output exactly
Return empty string where the problem specifies no results

examples.explanation: See test case: Basic log with two IPs
